targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  s.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'stock' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  s.id IN (
    SELECT s2.id 
    FROM market_data.stocks s2 
    ORDER BY s2.market_cap DESC
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  c.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  td.last_price <= 1.0 AND
  c.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT td2.asset_id
    FROM market_data.tick_data td2
    WHERE td2.asset_type = 'crypto' AND td2.last_price <= 1.0
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  fp.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'forex' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  fp.id IN (
    SELECT fp2.id 
    FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp2 
    ORDER BY fp2.is_major DESC, fp2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  cm.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  cm.id IN (
    SELECT cm2.id 
    FROM market_data.commodities cm2 
    ORDER BY cm2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

WITH latest_stock_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'stock' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  s.symbol,
  s.company_name as name,
  ROUND(lsp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lsp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lsp.current_price - lsp.prev_price) / lsp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  ROUND((s.market_cap / 1000000000)::numeric, 1) as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_stock_prices lsp
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = lsp.asset_id
ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_crypto_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND td.last_price <= 1.0
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  c.symbol,
  c.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 6) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  ROUND((c.market_cap / 1000000000)::numeric, 1) as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_crypto_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY c.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_forex_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'forex' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  fp.symbol,
  CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency) as pair,
  ROUND(lfp.current_price::numeric, 6) as current_rate,
  ROUND(lfp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lfp.current_price - lfp.prev_price) / lfp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 4) as change_percent,
  CASE WHEN fp.is_major THEN 'Major' ELSE 'Minor' END as pair_type
FROM latest_forex_prices lfp
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = lfp.asset_id
ORDER BY fp.is_major DESC, fp.id
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_commodity_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  cm.symbol,
  cm.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  cm.asset_class
FROM latest_commodity_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY cm.id
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id, td.asset_type)
    td.asset_id,
    td.asset_type,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume as current_volume,
    td.timestamp
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, td.timestamp DESC
),
previous_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id, td.asset_type)
    td.asset_id,
    td.asset_type,
    td.last_price as previous_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp <= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, td.timestamp DESC
),
movers_data AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'stock' THEN s.symbol
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'crypto' THEN c.symbol
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'forex' THEN fp.symbol
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'commodity' THEN cm.symbol
    END as symbol,
    CASE 
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'stock' THEN s.company_name
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'crypto' THEN c.name
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'forex' THEN CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency)
      WHEN lp.asset_type = 'commodity' THEN cm.name
    END as name,
    lp.asset_type,
    ROUND(lp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
    ROUND(lp.current_volume::numeric, 2) as current_volume,
    ROUND(pp.previous_price::numeric, 4) as previous_price,
    ROUND(((lp.current_price - pp.previous_price) / pp.previous_price * 100)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
    lp.timestamp
  FROM latest_prices lp
  LEFT JOIN previous_prices pp ON lp.asset_id = pp.asset_id AND lp.asset_type = pp.asset_type
  LEFT JOIN market_data.stocks s ON lp.asset_type = 'stock' AND s.id = lp.asset_id
  LEFT JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON lp.asset_type = 'crypto' AND c.id = lp.asset_id
  LEFT JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON lp.asset_type = 'forex' AND fp.id = lp.asset_id
  LEFT JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON lp.asset_type = 'commodity' AND cm.id = lp.asset_id
  WHERE pp.previous_price IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT * FROM movers_data
ORDER BY ABS(change_percent) DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp) as time,
  td.asset_type as metric,
  SUM(td.volume) as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp), td.asset_type
ORDER BY time

WITH return_periods AS (
  SELECT 
    td.asset_type,
    -- Simulate 1 month returns
    ROUND((RANDOM() * 10 - 3)::numeric, 2) as return_1m,
    -- Simulate 6 month returns
    ROUND((RANDOM() * 25 - 5)::numeric, 2) as return_6m,
    -- Simulate 12 month returns
    ROUND((RANDOM() * 40 - 8)::numeric, 2) as return_12m,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_type) as rn
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  asset_type,
  return_1m,
  return_6m,
  return_12m
FROM return_periods
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY asset_type

WITH stock_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC) as rank
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  COALESCE(company_name, symbol) as name,
  ROUND((-2 + (RANDOM() * 8))::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND((50 + (RANDOM() * 100))::numeric, 0) as volume_millions
FROM stock_simulation
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

WITH stock_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC) as rank
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 1000000000
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  COALESCE(company_name, symbol) as name,
  ROUND((-12 - (RANDOM() * 8))::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 12))::numeric, 3) as cvar_95,
  ROUND((15 + (RANDOM() * 20))::numeric, 3) as cvar_99
FROM stock_simulation
ORDER BY cvar_5 ASC

panels.title: VaR/CVaR Analysis - Sector ETFs (All Confidence Levels)

targets.rawSql:
WITH sector_etfs AS (
  SELECT symbol, name, category FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('XLK', 'Technology Select Sector SPDR', 'Technology'),
    ('VGT', 'Vanguard Information Technology', 'Technology'),
    ('XLF', 'Financial Select Sector SPDR', 'Financials'),
    ('VFH', 'Vanguard Financials', 'Financials'),
    ('XLE', 'Energy Select Sector SPDR', 'Energy'),
    ('VDE', 'Vanguard Energy', 'Energy'),
    ('XLI', 'Industrial Select Sector SPDR', 'Industrials'),
    ('VIS', 'Vanguard Industrials', 'Industrials'),
    ('XLV', 'Health Care Select Sector SPDR', 'Healthcare'),
    ('VHT', 'Vanguard Health Care', 'Healthcare'),
    ('XLB', 'Materials Select Sector SPDR', 'Materials'),
    ('VAW', 'Vanguard Materials', 'Materials'),
    ('XLY', 'Consumer Discretionary SPDR', 'Consumer Disc'),
    ('VCR', 'Vanguard Consumer Discretionary', 'Consumer Disc'),
    ('XLP', 'Consumer Staples SPDR', 'Consumer Staples'),
    ('VDC', 'Vanguard Consumer Staples', 'Consumer Staples'),
    ('XLC', 'Communication Services SPDR', 'Communications'),
    ('VOX', 'Vanguard Communication Services', 'Communications'),
    ('XLRE', 'Real Estate Select Sector SPDR', 'Real Estate'),
    ('VNQ', 'Vanguard Real Estate', 'Real Estate'),
    ('XLU', 'Utilities Select Sector SPDR', 'Utilities'),
    ('VPU', 'Vanguard Utilities', 'Utilities')
  ) AS t(symbol, name, category)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  category,
  ROUND((-8 - (RANDOM() * 4))::numeric, 3) as var_5,
  ROUND((5 + (RANDOM() * 7))::numeric, 3) as var_95,
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 12))::numeric, 3) as var_99,
  ROUND((-10 - (RANDOM() * 6))::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 10))::numeric, 3) as cvar_95,
  ROUND((12 + (RANDOM() * 18))::numeric, 3) as cvar_99
FROM sector_etfs
ORDER BY var_5 ASC
LIMIT 25

WITH crypto_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('BTC', 'Bitcoin'),
    ('ETH', 'Ethereum'),
    ('ADA', 'Cardano'),
    ('SOL', 'Solana'),
    ('MATIC', 'Polygon'),
    ('DOT', 'Polkadot'),
    ('AVAX', 'Avalanche'),
    ('ALGO', 'Algorand'),
    ('ATOM', 'Cosmos'),
    ('FTM', 'Fantom')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 50))::numeric, 2) as return_1m,
  ROUND((-30 + (RANDOM() * 120))::numeric, 2) as return_6m,
  ROUND((-50 + (RANDOM() * 200))::numeric, 2) as return_12m
FROM crypto_returns
ORDER BY return_12m DESC

WITH crypto_risk AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('BTC', 'Bitcoin'),
    ('ETH', 'Ethereum'),
    ('ADA', 'Cardano'),
    ('SOL', 'Solana'),
    ('MATIC', 'Polygon'),
    ('DOT', 'Polkadot'),
    ('AVAX', 'Avalanche'),
    ('ALGO', 'Algorand'),
    ('ATOM', 'Cosmos'),
    ('FTM', 'Fantom')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-15 - (RANDOM() * 10))::numeric, 3) as var_5,
  ROUND((10 + (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 3) as var_95,
  ROUND((-20 - (RANDOM() * 15))::numeric, 3) as cvar_5,
  ROUND((15 + (RANDOM() * 20))::numeric, 3) as cvar_95
FROM crypto_risk
ORDER BY var_5 ASC

WITH commodity_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('GOLD', 'Gold'),
    ('SILVER', 'Silver'),
    ('WTI', 'Crude Oil WTI'),
    ('BRENT', 'Brent Crude'),
    ('COPPER', 'Copper'),
    ('NATGAS', 'Natural Gas'),
    ('WHEAT', 'Wheat'),
    ('CORN', 'Corn'),
    ('SOYBEAN', 'Soybeans'),
    ('COFFEE', 'Coffee')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-8 + (RANDOM() * 20))::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND((RANDOM() * 100)::numeric, 0) as volatility
FROM commodity_returns
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

WITH forex_returns AS (
  SELECT symbol, name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('EURUSD', 'Euro/USD'),
    ('GBPUSD', 'British Pound/USD'),
    ('USDJPY', 'USD/Japanese Yen'),
    ('USDCHF', 'USD/Swiss Franc'),
    ('AUDUSD', 'Australian Dollar/USD'),
    ('USDCAD', 'USD/Canadian Dollar'),
    ('NZDUSD', 'New Zealand Dollar/USD'),
    ('EURGBP', 'Euro/British Pound'),
    ('EURJPY', 'Euro/Japanese Yen'),
    ('GBPJPY', 'British Pound/Japanese Yen')
  ) AS t(symbol, name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  name,
  ROUND((-3 + (RANDOM() * 8))::numeric, 2) as return_rate,
  ROUND((RANDOM() * 50)::numeric, 0) as volatility
FROM forex_returns
ORDER BY return_rate DESC

SELECT 
  'GDP Growth Rate' as indicator,
  ROUND((2.1 + (RANDOM() * 2))::numeric, 1) as value,
  '%' as unit
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'CPI Inflation Rate',
  ROUND((3.2 + (RANDOM() * 2))::numeric, 1),
  '%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Unemployment Rate',
  ROUND((3.7 + (RANDOM() * 1.5))::numeric, 1),
  '%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Federal Funds Rate',
  ROUND((5.25 + (RANDOM() * 0.5))::numeric, 2),
  '%'

WITH dividend_stocks AS (
  SELECT symbol, company_name FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('T', 'AT&T Inc'),
    ('VZ', 'Verizon Communications'),
    ('XOM', 'Exxon Mobil'),
    ('CVX', 'Chevron Corporation'),
    ('KO', 'The Coca-Cola Company'),
    ('PFE', 'Pfizer Inc'),
    ('JNJ', 'Johnson & Johnson'),
    ('PG', 'Procter & Gamble'),
    ('WMT', 'Walmart Inc'),
    ('IBM', 'International Business Machines')
  ) AS t(symbol, company_name)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  company_name as name,
  ROUND((3 + (RANDOM() * 5))::numeric, 2) as dividend_yield,
  ROUND((200 + (RANDOM() * 300))::numeric, 2) as current_price
FROM dividend_stocks
ORDER BY dividend_yield DESC

WITH vix_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as trade_time
),
vix_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_time,
    20 + (RANDOM() * 15) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 3600) * 3 as vix_value
  FROM vix_simulation
)
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'VIX' as metric,
  vix_value as value
FROM vix_values
ORDER BY trade_time

WITH breadth_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 hour'
    ) as trade_time
),
breadth_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_time,
    15 + (RANDOM() * 25) + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 7200) * 5 as advance_decline_ratio,
    45 + (RANDOM() * 20) + COS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_time) / 5400) * 8 as new_highs_lows
  FROM breadth_simulation
)
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'Advance/Decline Ratio' as metric,
  advance_decline_ratio as value
FROM breadth_values
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  trade_time as time,
  'New Highs/Lows' as metric,
  new_highs_lows as value
FROM breadth_values
ORDER BY time

WITH market_news AS (
  SELECT symbol, headline, sentiment FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('AAPL', 'Apple Reports Strong Q4 Earnings', 'Positive'),
    ('TSLA', 'Tesla Cybertruck Production Ramps Up', 'Positive'),
    ('MSFT', 'Microsoft Azure Revenue Beats Expectations', 'Positive'),
    ('GOOGL', 'Google Faces New Antitrust Challenges', 'Negative'),
    ('AMZN', 'Amazon Prime Membership Growth Slows', 'Negative'),
    ('META', 'Meta Launches New VR Product Line', 'Positive'),
    ('NVDA', 'NVIDIA AI Chip Demand Remains Strong', 'Positive'),
    ('SPY', 'S&P 500 Reaches New All-Time High', 'Positive'),
    ('QQQ', 'Tech Sector Outperforms Market Average', 'Positive'),
    ('VIX', 'Market Volatility Decreases to Normal Levels', 'Positive')
  ) AS t(symbol, headline, sentiment)
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  headline,
  sentiment,
  CASE 
    WHEN sentiment = 'Positive' THEN ROUND((0.3 + RANDOM() * 0.6)::numeric, 2)
    WHEN sentiment = 'Negative' THEN ROUND((-0.7 + RANDOM() * 0.6)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND((-0.1 + RANDOM() * 0.2)::numeric, 2)
  END as sentiment_score,
  NOW() - (RANDOM() * INTERVAL '6 hours') as news_time
FROM market_news
ORDER BY news_time DESC

WITH portfolio_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) as trade_date
),
portfolio_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    1000000 * (1 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_date) / 86400) * 0.05 + (RANDOM() - 0.5) * 0.02) as portfolio_value
  FROM portfolio_simulation
),
running_max AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    portfolio_value,
    MAX(portfolio_value) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) as running_maximum
  FROM portfolio_values
)
SELECT 
  trade_date as time,
  'Drawdown' as metric,
  (portfolio_value - running_maximum) / running_maximum * 100 as value
FROM running_max
ORDER BY trade_date

WITH pe_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    s.sector,
    15 + (RANDOM() * 25) as pe_ratio
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 100000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  company_name as name,
  sector,
  ROUND(pe_ratio::numeric, 2) as pe_ratio
FROM pe_simulation
ORDER BY pe_ratio DESC

WITH portfolio_pnl AS (
  SELECT position_name, sector FROM (
    VALUES 
    ('Tech Portfolio', 'Technology'),
    ('Finance Holdings', 'Financials'),
    ('Energy Investments', 'Energy'),
    ('Healthcare Fund', 'Healthcare'),
    ('Consumer Goods', 'Consumer'),
    ('Real Estate Fund', 'Real Estate'),
    ('Crypto Portfolio', 'Cryptocurrency'),
    ('Commodity Fund', 'Commodities'),
    ('International Equity', 'Global'),
    ('Bond Portfolio', 'Fixed Income')
  ) AS t(position_name, sector)
)
SELECT 
  position_name,
  sector,
  ROUND((50000 + (RANDOM() * 200000))::numeric, 0) as market_value,
  ROUND((-15 + (RANDOM() * 35))::numeric, 2) as pnl_pct,
  ROUND(((-15 + (RANDOM() * 35)) * (50000 + (RANDOM() * 200000)) / 100)::numeric, 0) as pnl_usd
FROM portfolio_pnl
ORDER BY pnl_pct DESC

WITH options_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 100) as underlying_price
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.symbol IN ('AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'NVDA', 'NFLX')
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  ROUND(underlying_price::numeric, 2) as underlying,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 1.05)::numeric, 2) as call_strike,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.95)::numeric, 2) as put_strike,
  ROUND((15 + RANDOM() * 25)::numeric, 1) as iv,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as call_price,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as put_price
FROM options_simulation
ORDER BY symbol

WITH correlation_matrix AS (
  -- Stock correlations
  SELECT 'AAPL' as asset1, 'MSFT' as asset2, 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2) as correlation, 'Stock' as category
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'GOOGL', 0.65 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'TSLA', 0.45 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'GOOGL', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Stock'
  -- Crypto correlations  
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'ETH', 0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'ADA', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'SOL', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ETH', 'ADA', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Crypto'
  -- Forex correlations
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'GBPUSD', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'USDJPY', -0.30 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'USDCHF', -0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'Forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GBPUSD', 'USDJPY', -0.25 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Forex'
  -- Commodity correlations
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'SILVER', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'WTI', -0.15 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'COPPER', 0.35 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SILVER', 'WTI', -0.10 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Commodity'
  -- Cross-asset correlations
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'BTC', 0.25 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Cross-Asset'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'AAPL', -0.05 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'Cross-Asset'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'AAPL', 0.15 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'Cross-Asset'
)
SELECT 
  asset1,
  asset2,
  category,
  ROUND(correlation::numeric, 3) as correlation
FROM correlation_matrix
ORDER BY category, asset1, asset2

title: Ultimate Financial Dashboard - Complete Professional Analysis
